title: astragalus oxyodon
intro: Astragalus oxyodon, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus oxyodon include reducing fatigue, improving immune function, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular conditions. Astragalus oxyodon can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
